name: @slix/obsidian-notes
description: Complete Obsidian-Flavored Markdown reference skill for the pi coding agent — wikilinks, callouts, embeds, properties, block refs, task lists, Mermaid, math, and OFM syntax.
readme:
# obsidian-notes

A [pi coding agent](https://pi.dev) skill providing a complete **Obsidian-Flavored Markdown** reference.

## What it does

Loads on-demand when the agent needs to write or edit notes in an Obsidian vault. Covers syntax that differs from standard CommonMark / GFM:

- Properties (YAML frontmatter)
- Wikilinks and embeds (`[[Note]]`, `![[file.png]]`)
- Callouts (`> [!note]`, `> [!warning]`, etc.)
- Block references (`^block-id`)
- Task lists with Obsidian checkbox variants
- Mermaid diagrams and LaTeX math
- Canvas, Dataview, and Templater conventions

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:@slix/obsidian-notes
```

## Usage

Pi loads this skill automatically when the task matches. You can also invoke it explicitly:

```
/skill:obsidian-notes
```
